author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev, creator David DM http://david-dm.org, co-creator & organiser @NodeBotsUK & @MeteorLondon meetups. Owner TABLEFLIP https://tableflip.io
author.name: Alan Shaw

content.text:
so 🔥 right now, the #IPFS CID inspector website got a big makeover and upgrade thanks to @olizilla:
http://cid-utils.ipfs.team/#zb2rhiVd5G2DSpnbYtty8NhYHeDvNkPxjSqA7YbDPuhdihj9L
super useful if you're wondering what's in those potato hashes
